plugins.description: 10 Fable 5-native Agent Skills: effort routing, scope fencing, no gold-plating, evidence-bound progress, act-on-sufficiency, verifier subagents, autonomy contracts, lesson memory with an anti-poisoning gate, reader-first summaries, and refusal-aware API calling.
